name: daily-dsa-intuition-builder
description: Slack-based daily DSA teaching pipeline focused on intuition and pattern recognition.

scripts.phase0:verify: bash scripts/check-db.sh && bash scripts/check-openrouter.sh && bash scripts/post-slack-test.sh
scripts.phase1:verify: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed && npm run db:test
scripts.test: npm run db:test && node --env-file=.env --import tsx --test agents/pipeline.test.ts && node --env-file=.env --import tsx --test orchestrator/priority-resolver.test.ts && node --env-file=.env --import tsx --test orchestrator/index.test.ts && node --env-file=.env --import tsx --test orchestrator/hardening.test.ts && node --env-file=.env --import tsx --test slack/listener.test.ts
